chunks.text: Student Award: Warren Y. Dere Design Award | EECS at UC Berkeley Warren Y. Dere Design Award This award is presented to graduating seniors whose accomplishments in engineering design are judged to be most outstanding. Evidence might include accomplishments during a co-op or internship assignment or on a summer job, or achievements on a project for an upper division design course. This memorial award honors Professor Dere who also worked at IBM and was known to be outstanding in engineering systems design. Awardees 2024-2025 Elam Day-Friedland, Anish Dhanashekar, Max Wilcoxson 2023-2024 Rohan Kumar, Viansa Schmulbach 2022-2023 Kamyar Salahi 2021-2022 Gautam Mittal 2020-2021 Adi Ganapathi, Harry Zhang 2019-2020 Ahad Rauf 2018-2019 Philipp Wu, Brent Yi 2017-2018 Rohan Phadte 2016-2017 Xinyang (Young) Geng, David Marn, Ashvin Nair, Mihir Patil 2015-2016 Peter James Ahrens, Dibyo Debasish Majumdar, Thaibao Quoc Phan, Marvin Zhang 2014-2015 Edward Groshev, Wisam Reid, Eldon Schoop, Rishi Sharma, Sahaana Suri 2013-2014 Siddhartho Bhattacharya, Ankush Gupta, Rohin Shah, Claire Margaret Tuna 2012-2013 Kathy Sun, Ziang Xie 2011-2012 Yewen Pu, Wei Wu 2010-2011 James Ide 2009-2010 Hartej Dhami, Farzad Fatollahi-Fard, Amanullah Mohiudin 2008-2009 Minh Van Pham Ly, Ashik Manandhar, Trung Tran 2007-2008 Wai Son (Wilson) Ko 2006-2007 John Breneman, Robert Gregg, Roderick Mann 2005-2006 Rosen Nikolaev Diankov 2004-2005 Arlo Faria 2003-2004 Michael Toomin 2002-2003 Daniel Horn 2001-2002 Aman Bhargava 2000-2001 Jeffrey Heer 1999-2000 Paul Huang 1998-1999 Chris Olston 1997-1998 Dmitry Derevyanko, Allan Liu, Yuriy Regelman 1996-1997 Edmond Lau 1995-1996 David Hsu 1994-1995 Ravi Narasimhan 1993-1994 Michael Horton 1992-1993 "Leo" Ki-Chun Fu, Trevor
